id: get-disabled-languages-2
title: "Get disabled languages for all keys in project"
description: "Returns all project key with any disabled language."
sidebar_label: "Get disabled languages for all keys in project"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get disabled languages for all keys in project"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v2/projects/{projectId}/all-keys-with-disabled-languages"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns all project key with any disabled language.

If key has no disabled language, it is not returned.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
